This version of Node.js requires\r\nNODE_MODULE_VERSION 136.\r\n```\r\n\r\n## Root Cause\r\n\r\n- Cursor uses **Electron 37-39** which requires **NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136**\r\n- The installed `better-sqlite3@11.10.0` only had prebuilt binaries up to Electron 33 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 130)\r\n- The binary needed to be compiled specifically for the Electron version used by Cursor\r\n\r\n## Solution\r\n\r\n### 1. Updated better-sqlite3 to Latest Version\r\n\r\n**Changed**: `package.json`\r\n```json\r\n\"dependencies\": {\r\n  \"better-sqlite3\": \"^12.5.0\",  // was ^11.0.0\r\n  \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\nThe newer version (12.5.0) includes prebuilt binaries for Electron 39 (NODE_MODULE_VERSION 136).\r\n\r\n### 2. Created Automated Setup Script\r\n\r\n**Created**: `setup-sqlite.js`\r\n- Automatically detects the Electron version\r\n- Tries multiple Electron versions (39, 37, 36, 33) for compatibility\r\n- Downloads the correct prebuilt binary\r\n- Provides helpful error messages if no prebuilt binary is available\r\n\r\n**Added to package.json**:\r\n```json\r\n\"scripts\": {\r\n  \"postinstall\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\",\r\n  \"setup\": \"node setup-sqlite.js\"\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n### 3. Updated Documentation\r\n\r\n**Updated files**:\r\n- `QUICK_START.md`: Added comprehensive troubleshooting section\r\n- `README.md`: Added installation notes with links to troubleshooting\r\n- `INSTALL_NOTES.md`: Created detailed technical documentation\r\n\r\n## Verification\r\n\r\n✅ `npm install` - Successfully installs all dependencies and downloads correct binary  \r\n✅ `npm run setup` - Manually runs setup script successfully  \r\n✅ `npm run compile` - TypeScript compilation successful  \r\n✅ Binary installed at: `node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node`\r\n\r\n## How It Works Now\r\n\r\n1. **During Installation**:\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm install\r\n   ```\r\n   - Installs dependencies including `better-sqlite3@12.5.0`\r\n   - `postinstall` script runs automatically\r\n   - Detects Electron version (39.2.7 from node_modules)\r\n   - Downloads prebuilt binary for Electron 39\r\n   - Falls back to other versions (37, 36, 33) if needed\r\n\r\n2. **Manual Setup** (if needed):\r\n   ```bash\r\n   npm run setup\r\n   ```\r\n   - Runs the same setup process manually\r\n   - Useful if postinstall fails or binaries are deleted\r\n\r\n3. **Fallback** (if no prebuilt binaries):\r\n   - Install Visual Studio Build Tools\r\n   - Build from source using `npm rebuild better-sqlite3 --build-from-source`\r\n\r\n## Testing the Extension\r\n\r\nThe extension should now work correctly in Cursor/VSCode:\r\n\r\n1.   "contents": "/**\n * 聊天历史搜索功能\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { createTranslator } from './i18n';\n\n/**\n * 搜索结果项\n */\nexport interface SearchResult {\n    filePath: string;\n    fileName: string;\n    title: string;\n    createdDate: Date;\n    messageCount: number;\n    sessionId: string;\n    matchedLines: Array<{\n        lineNumber: number;\n        content: string;\n        context: string;\n        type: 'title' | 'user' | 'assistant' | 'tool' | 'metadata';\n    }>;\n    relevanceScore: number;\n}\n\n/**\n * 聊天历史搜索器\n */\nexport class ChatHistorySearcher {\n    private translator: (key: string) => string;\n\n    constructor(locale: string = 'auto') {\n        this.translator = createTranslator(locale);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 在工作区中搜索聊天历史\n     */\n    async searchInWorkspace(query: string, workspaceRoot: string): Promise<SearchResult[]> {\n        const outputDir = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history/history');\n        const historyPath = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n\n        if (!fs.existsSync(historyPath)) {\n            return [];\n        }\n\n        const results: SearchResult[] = [];\n        const files = fs.readdirSync(historyPath)\n            .filter(file => file.endsWith('.md'))\n            .map(file => path.join(historyPath, file));\n\n        for (const filePath of files) {\n            try {\n                const result = await this.searchInFile(filePath, query);\n                if (result) {\n                    results.push(result);\n                }\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.warn(`Error searching file ${filePath}:`, error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 按相关性得分排序\n        return results.sort((a, b) => b.relevanceScore - a.relevanceScore);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 在单个文件中搜索\n     */\n    private async searchInFile(filePath: string, query: string): Promise<SearchResult | null> {\n        const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');\n        const lines = content.split('\\n');\n\n        // 解析文件元数据\n        const metadata = this.parseMetadata(lines);\n        if (!metadata) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        // 搜索匹配的行\n        const matchedLines: SearchResult['matchedLines'] = [];\n        const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();\n\n        lines.forEach((line, index) => {\n            const lineLower = line.toLowerCase();\n            if (lineLower.includes(queryLower)) {\n                const type = this.determineLineType(line, index, lines);\n                const context = this.getContext(lines, index);\n\n                matchedLines.push({\n                    lineNumber: index + 1,\n                    content: line.trim(),\n                    context: context,\n                    type: type\n                });\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (matchedLines.length === 0) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        // 计算相关性得分\n        const relevanceScore = this.calculateRelevanceScore(matchedLines, query);\n\n        return {\n            filePath,\n            fileName: path.basename(filePath),\n            title: metadata.title,\n            createdDate: metadata.createdDate,\n            messageCount: metadata.messageCount,\n            sessionId: metadata.sessionId,\n            matchedLines,\n            relevanceScore\n        };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 解析文件元数据\n     */\n    private parseMetadata(lines: string[]): { title: string; createdDate: Date; messageCount: number; sessionId: string } | null {\n        let title = '';\n        let createdDate: Date | null = null;\n        let messageCount = 0;\n        let sessionId = '';\n\n        for (const line of lines) {\n            // 标题行\n            if (line.startsWith('# ')) {\n                title = line.substring(2).trim();\n            }\n            // 创建时间\n            else if (line.includes('**Created**:') || line.includes('**创建时间**:')) {\n                const dateMatch = line.match(/\\*\\*.*?\\*\\*\\s*(.+)/);\n                if (dateMatch) {\n                    createdDate = new Date(dateMatch[1].trim());\n                }\n            }\n            // 消息数量\n            else if (line.includes('**Messages**:') || line.includes('**消息**:')) {\n                const countMatch = line.match(/\\*\\*.*?\\*\\*\\s*(\\d+)/);\n                if (countMatch) {\n                    messageCount = parseInt(countMatch[1]);\n                }\n            }\n            // 会话ID\n            else if (line.includes('**Session ID**:') || line.includes('**会话ID**:')) {\n                const idMatch = line.match(/\\*\\*.*?\\*\\*\\s*(.+)/);\n                if (idMatch) {\n                    sessionId = idMatch[1].trim();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        if (!title || !createdDate) {\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        return { title, createdDate, messageCount, sessionId };\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 判断行的类型\n     */\n    private determineLineType(line: string, index: number, lines: string[]): SearchResult['matchedLines'][0]['type'] {\n        // 标题\n        if (line.startsWith('# ')) {\n            return 'title';\n        }\n        // 用户消息\n        if (line.includes('💬 User') || line.includes('💬 用户')) {\n            return 'user';\n        }\n        // 助手消息\n        if (line.includes('🤖 Assistant') || line.includes('🤖 助手')) {\n            return 'assistant';\n        }\n        // 工具使用\n        if (line.includes('🔧 Tool Uses') || line.includes('🔧 工具使用')) {\n            return 'tool';\n        }\n        // 元数据\n        if (line.includes('**Created**:') || line.includes('**Messages**:') || line.includes('**Session ID**:')) {\n            return 'metadata';\n        }\n\n        // 检查上下文来确定类型\n        for (let i = Math.max(0, index - 5); i < Math.min(lines.length, index + 5); i++) {\n            const contextLine = lines[i];\n            if (contextLine.includes('💬 User') || contextLine.includes('💬 用户')) {\n                return 'user';\n            }\n            if (contextLine.includes('🤖 Assistant') || contextLine.includes('🤖 助手')) {\n                return 'assistant';\n            }\n        }\n\n        return 'metadata';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取上下文\n     */\n    private getContext(lines: string[], index: number): string {\n        const start = Math.max(0, index - 2);\n        const end = Math.min(lines.length, index + 3);\n        return lines.slice(start, end)\n            .filter(line => line.trim())\n            .join(' ')\n            .substring(0, 200);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 计算相关性得分\n     */\n    private calculateRelevanceScore(matchedLines: SearchResult['matchedLines'], query: string): number {\n        let score = 0;\n        const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();\n\n        for (const match of matchedLines) {\n            // 标题匹配权重更高\n            if (match.type === 'title') {\n                score += 10;\n            }\n            // 用户和助手消息权重中等\n            else if (match.type === 'user' || match.type === 'assistant') {\n                score += 5;\n            }\n            // 其他类型权重较低\n            else {\n                score += 1;\n            }\n\n            // 精确匹配权重更高\n            if (match.content.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)) {\n                score += 2;\n            }\n\n            // 多个匹配增加得分\n            score += matchedLines.length * 0.1;\n        }\n\n        return score;\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 显示搜索界面\n */\nexport async function showSearchInterface(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\n        vscode.window.showErrorMessage('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const locale = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\n    const t = createTranslator(locale);\n\n    // 输入搜索查询\n    const query = await vscode.window.showInputBox({\n        placeHolder: t('search.placeholder'),\n        prompt: t('search.prompt'),\n        ignoreFocusOut: true\n    });\n\n    if (!query || !query.trim()) {\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 显示进度\n    await vscode.window.withProgress({\n        location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n        title: t('search.searching'),\n        cancellable: false\n    }, async (progress) => {\n        progress.report({ increment: 0, message: 'Searching chat history...' });\n\n        const searcher = new ChatHistorySearcher(locale);\n        const results = await searcher.searchInWorkspace(query.trim(), workspaceRoot);\n\n        progress.report({ increment: 100 });\n\n        if (results.length === 0) {\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('search.noResults'));\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 显示结果\n        await showSearchResults(results, query, t);\n    });\n}\n\n/**\n * 显示搜索结果\n */\nasync function showSearchResults(results: SearchResult[], query: string, t: (key: string) => string) {\n    const items = results.map(result => ({\n        label: result.title,\n        description: `${result.fileName} (${result.matchedLines.length} matches)`,\n        detail: `Created: ${result.createdDate.toLocaleDateString()} | Messages: ${result.messageCount}`,\n        result: result\n    }));\n\n    const selected = await vscode.window.showQuickPick(items, {\n        matchOnDescription: true,\n        matchOnDetail: true,\n        placeHolder: `Found ${results.length} conversation(s) matching \"${query}\"`\n    });\n\n    if (selected) {\n        await showDetailedResult(selected.result, query, t);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 显示详细结果\n */\nasync function showDetailedResult(result: SearchResult, query: string, t: (key: string) => string) {\n    // 打开文件\n    const document = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(result.filePath);\n    const editor = await vscode.window.showTextDocument(document);\n\n    // 如果有匹配行，跳转到第一个匹配\n    if (result.matchedLines.length > 0) {\n        const firstMatch = result.matchedLines[0];\n        const position = new vscode.Position(firstMatch.lineNumber - 1, 0);\n        editor.selection = new vscode.Selection(position, position);\n        editor.revealRange(new vscode.Range(position, position), vscode.TextEditorRevealType.InCenter);\n    }\n\n    // 显示匹配详情\n    const matchDetails = result.matchedLines.map(match => {\n        const typeIcon = {\n            title: '📝',\n            user: '💬',\n            assistant: '🤖',\n            tool: '🔧',\n            metadata: '📊'\n        }[match.type];\n\n        return `${typeIcon} Line ${match.lineNumber}: ${match.content}`;\n    }).join('\\n');\n\n    const message = `Found ${result.matchedLines.length} match(es) in \"${result.title}\"\\n\\n${matchDetails}`;\n\n    const openFile = t('search.openFile');\n    const selection = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(message, openFile);\n\n    if (selection === openFile) {\n        // 文件已经在前面打开了，这里可以添加额外的操作\n    }\n}"
}

  await vscode.window.withProgress({\r\n        location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\r\n        title: t('search.searching'),\r\n        cancellable: false\r\n    }, async (progress) => {\r\n        progress.report({ increment: 0, message: 'Searching chat history...' });\r\n\r\n        const searcher = new ChatHistorySearcher(locale);\r\n        const results = await searcher.searchInWorkspace(query.trim(), workspaceRoot);\r\n\r\n        progress.report({ increment: 100 });\r\n\r\n        if (results.length === 0) {\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('search.noResults'));\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 显示结果\r\n        await showSearchResults(results, query, t);\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 显示搜索结果\r\n */\r\nasync function showSearchResults(results: SearchResult[], query: string, t: (key: string) => string) {\r\n    const items = results.map(result => ({\r\n        label: result.title,\r\n        description: `${result.fileName} (${result.matchedLines.length} matches)`,\r\n        detail: `Created: ${result.createdDate.toLocaleDateString()} | Messages: ${result.messageCount}`,\r\n        result: result\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    const selected = await vscode.window.showQuickPick(items, {\r\n        matchOnDescription: true,\r\n        matchOnDetail: true,\r\n        placeHolder: `Found ${results.length} conversation(s) matching \"${query}\"`\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (selected) {\r\n        await showDetailedResult(selected.result, query, t);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 显示详细结果\r\n */\r\nasync function showDetailedResult(result: SearchResult, query: string, t: (key: string) => string) {\r\n    // 打开文件\r\n    const document = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(result.filePath);\r\n    const editor = await vscode.window.showTextDocument(document);\r\n\r\n    // 如果有匹配行，跳转到第一个匹配\r\n    if (result.matchedLines.length > 0) {\r\n        const firstMatch = result.matchedLines[0];\r\n        const position = new vscode.Position(firstMatch.lineNumber - 1, 0);\r\n        editor.selection = new vscode.Selection(position, position);\r\n        editor.revealRange(new vscode.Range(position, position), vscode.TextEditorRevealType.InCenter);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 显示匹配详情\r\n    const matchDetails = result.matchedLines.map(match => {\r\n        const typeIcon = {\r\n            title: '📝',\r\n            user: '💬',\r\n            assistant: '🤖',\r\n            tool: '🔧',\r\n            metadata: '📊'\r\n        }[match.type];\r\n\r\n        return `${typeIcon} Line ${match.lineNumber}: ${match.content}`;\r\n    }).join('\\n');\r\n\r\n    const message = `Found ${result.matchedLines.length} match(es) in \"${result.title}\"\\n\\n${matchDetails}`;\r\n\r\n    const openFile = t('search.openFile');\r\n    const selection = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(message, openFile);\r\n\r\n    if (selection === openFile) {\r\n        // 文件已经在前面打开了，这里可以添加额外的操作\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n"

}\r\n            // 创建时间\r\n            else if (line.includes('**Created**:') || line.includes('**创建时间**:')) {\r\n                const dateMatch = line.match(/\\*\\*.*?\\*\\*\\s*(.+)/);\r\n 判断行的类型\r\n     */\r\n    private determineLineType(line: string, index: number, lines: string[]): SearchResult['matchedLines'][0]['type'] {\r\n        // 标题\r\n        if (line.startsWith('# ')) {\r\n if (line.includes('🤖 Assistant') || line.includes('🤖 助手')) {\r\n            return 'assistant';\r\n        }\r\n        // 工具使用\r\n        if (line.includes('🔧 Tool Uses') || line.includes('🔧 工具使用')) return 'metadata';\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 检查上下文来确定类型\r\n        for (let i = Math.max(0, index - 5); i < Math.min(lines.length, index + 5); i++) {\r\n            const contextLine = lines[i];\r\n            if (contextLine.includes('💬 User') || contextLine.includes('💬 用户')) {\r\n                return 'user';\r\n            }\r\n            if (contextLine.includes('🤖 Assistant') private getContext(lines: string[], index: number): string {\r\n        const start = Math.max(0, index - 2);\r\n        const end = Math.min(lines.length, index + 3);\r\n        return calculateRelevanceScore(matchedLines: SearchResult['matchedLines'], query: string): number {\r\n        let score = 0;\r\n        const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();\r\n\r\n        for (const match of matchedLines) {\r\n            // 标题匹配权重更高\r\n            if (match.type === 'title') {\r\n                score += 10;\r\n            }\r\n            // 用户和助手消息权重中等\r\n            else if (match.type === 'user' || match.type === 'assistant') {\r\n                score += 5;\r\n            }\r\n            // 其他类型权重较低\r\n            else {\r\n                score += 1;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 精确匹配权重更高\r\n            if (match.content.toLowerCase().includes(queryLower)) {\r\n                score += 2;\r\n            }\r\n\r\n            // 多个匹配增加得分\r\n            score += matchedLines.length * 0.1;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        return score;\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 显示搜索界面\r\n */\r\nexport async function showSearchInterface(context: open');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\r\n    const locale = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\r\n    const t = createTranslator(locale);\r\n\r\n    // 输入搜索查询\r\n    const query = await vscode.window.showInputBox({\r\n        placeHolder: t('search.placeholder'),\r\n        prompt: t('search.prompt'),\r\n        ignoreFocusOut: true\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (!query || !query.trim()) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 显示进度\r\n    await vscode.window.withProgress({\r\n        location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\r\n        title: t('search.searching'),\r\n        cancellable: false\r\n    }, async (progress) => {\r\n        progress.report({ increment: 0, message: 'Searching chat history...' });\r\n\r\n        const searcher = new ChatHistorySearcher(locale);\r\n        const results = await searcher.searchInWorkspace(query.trim(), workspaceRoot);\r\n\r\n        progress.report({ increment: 100 });\r\n\r\n        if (results.length === 0) {\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('search.noResults'));\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 显示结果\r\n        await showSearchResults(results, query, t);\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 显示搜索结果\r\n */\r\nasync function showSearchResults(results: SearchResult[], query: string, t: (key: string) => string) {\r\n    const items = results.map(result => ({\r\n        label: result.title,\r\n        description: `${result.fileName} (${result.matchedLines.length} matches)`,\r\n        detail: `Created: ${result.createdDate.toLocaleDateString()} | Messages: ${result.messageCount}`,\r\n        result: result\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    const selected = await vscode.window.showQuickPick(items, {\r\n        matchOnDescription: true,\r\n        matchOnDetail: true,\r\n        placeHolder: `Found ${results.length} conversation(s) matching \"${query}\"`\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (selected) {\r\n        await showDetailedResult(selected.result, query, t);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 显示详细结果\r\n */\r\nasync function showDetailedResult(result: SearchResult, query: string, t: (key: string) => string) {\r\n    // 打开文件\r\n    const document = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(result.filePath);\r\n    const editor = await vscode.window.showTextDocument(document);\r\n\r\n    // 如果有匹配行，跳转到第一个匹配\r\n    if (result.matchedLines.length > 0) {\r\n        const firstMatch = result.matchedLines[0];\r\n        const position = new vscode.Position(firstMatch.lineNumber - 1, 0);\r\n        editor.selection = new vscode.Selection(position, position);\r\n        editor.revealRange(new vscode.Range(position, position), vscode.TextEditorRevealType.InCenter);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 显示匹配详情\r\n    const matchDetails = result.matchedLines.map(match => {\r\n        const typeIcon = {\r\n            title: '📝',\r\n ${match.content}`;\r\n    }).join('\\n');\r\n\r\n    const message = `Found ${result.matchedLines.length} match(es) in \"${result.title}\"\\n\\n${matchDetails}`;\r\n\r\n    const openFile = }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 计算相关性得分\r\n     */\r\n    private calculateRelevanceScore(matchedLines: SearchResult['matchedLines'], query: string): number {\r\n        let score = 0;\r\n        const {\r\n        progress.report({ increment: 0, message: 'Searching chat history...' });\r\n\r\n        const searcher = new ChatHistorySearcher(locale);\r\n        const results = await searcher.searchInWorkspace(query.trim(), workspaceRoot);\r\n\r\n        progress.report({ increment: 100 });\r\n\r\n        if (results.length === 0) {\r\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('search.noResults'));\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 显示结果\r\n        await showSearchResults(results, query, t as any);\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 显示搜索结果\r\n */\r\nasync function showSearchResults(results: SearchResult[], query: string, t: (key: string) => string) {\r\n    const items = results.map(result => ({\r\n        label: result.title,\r\n        description: `${result.fileName} (${result.matchedLines.length} matches)`,\r\n        detail: `Created: ${result.createdDate.toLocaleDateString()} | Messages: true,\r\n        placeHolder: `Found ${results.length} conversation(s) matching \"${query}\"`\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (selected) {\r\n        await showDetailedResult(selected.result, query, t);\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 显示详细结果\r\n */\r\nasync function showDetailedResult(result: SearchResult, query: string, t: (key: string, params?: Record<string, any>) => string) {\r\n    // 打开文件\r\n    const document = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument(result.filePath);\r\n    const editor = await vscode.window.showTextDocument(document);\r\n\r\n    // 如果有匹配行，跳转到第一个匹配\r\n    if (result.matchedLines.length > 0) {\r\n        const firstMatch = result.matchedLines[0];\r\n        const position = new vscode.Position(firstMatch.lineNumber - 1, 0);\r\n        editor.selection = new vscode.Selection(position, position);\r\n        editor.revealRange(new vscode.Range(position, position), vscode.TextEditorRevealType.InCenter);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // 显示匹配详情\r\n    const matchDetails = result.matchedLines.map(match => {\r\n        const typeIcon = {\r\n            title: '📝',\r\n            user: '💬',\r\n            assistant: '🤖',\r\n            tool: '🔧',\r\n ${result.matchedLines.length} match(es) in \"${result.title}\"\\n\\n${matchDetails}`;\r\n\r\n    const openFile = t('search.openFile');\r\n    const selection = await {
  "file_path": "SEARCH_FEATURE.md",
  "contents": "# 🔍 搜索功能使用指南\n\n## 功能概述\n\nAI Chat History Saver v0.2.8 新增了强大的全文本搜索功能，让您可以快速找到任何保存的对话内容。\n\n## 如何使用\n\n### 1. 打开搜索界面\n\n1. 在 VS Code 中按 `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS) 打开命令面板\n2. 输入并选择：`LLMChatHistory: Search Chat History`\n3. 或者在扩展面板中找到对应命令\n\n### 2. 输入搜索关键词\n\n- 在搜索框中输入您要查找的关键词\n- 支持中英文混合搜索\n- 可以搜索对话内容、标题、用户消息、助手回复等\n\n### 3. 查看搜索结果\n\n搜索完成后，会显示匹配的对话列表：\n- **对话标题** - 显示匹配的对话标题\n- **文件信息** - 显示文件名和匹配次数\n- **详细信息** - 显示创建时间和消息数量\n\n### 4. 打开对话文件\n\n- 从结果列表中选择一个对话\n- 文件将自动打开，并跳转到第一个匹配的位置\n- 匹配的文本行会被高亮显示\n\n## 搜索特性\n\n### 📝 智能匹配\n- **标题搜索** - 对话标题匹配权重最高\n- **内容搜索** - 搜索用户和助手的所有消息内容\n- **工具调用** - 搜索工具使用记录和结果\n- **元数据** - 搜索创建时间、会话ID等信息\n\n### 🎯 相关性排序\n- 搜索结果按相关性得分排序\n- 标题匹配 > 用户/助手消息 > 工具调用 > 元数据\n- 精确匹配得分更高\n\n### 🌍 多语言支持\n- 支持中英文界面\n- 自动适应 VS Code 语言设置\n- 搜索结果显示支持双语\n\n## 搜索示例\n\n### 示例 1: 搜索技术关键词\n```\n搜索: \"React authentication\"\n结果: 显示所有包含 React 认证相关内容的对话\n```\n\n### 示例 2: 搜索代码片段\n```\n搜索: \"useState\"\n结果: 显示所有包含 useState Hook 的对话\n```\n\n### 示例 3: 搜索工具调用\n```\n搜索: \"grep\"\n结果: 显示所有使用 grep 工具的对话\n```\n\n### 示例 4: 搜索对话标题\n```\n搜索: \"implementing\"\n结果: 显示标题包含 \"implementing\" 的对话\n```\n\n## 高级用法\n\n### 组合搜索\n```\n搜索: \"React component lifecycle\"\n结果: 显示同时包含 \"React\"、\"component\"、\"lifecycle\" 的对话\n```\n\n### 搜索特定类型内容\n- 用户消息: 搜索出现在 💬 用户标记下的内容\n- 助手回复: 搜索 🤖 助手标记下的内容\n- 工具结果: 搜索 🔧 工具使用记录\n\n## 故障排除\n\n### 没有搜索结果\n- 检查是否有保存的对话文件 (`.llm-chat-history/history/`)\n- 确认搜索关键词拼写正确\n- 尝试使用更简短或不同的关键词\n\n### 搜索速度慢\n- 大量对话文件时搜索可能需要一些时间\n- 这是正常现象，扩展正在处理所有文件\n\n### 文件无法打开\n- 确保对话文件没有被删除或移动\n- 检查工作区路径是否正确\n\n## 技术实现\n\n### 搜索算法\n- **全文本搜索**: 在所有 Markdown 文件中进行文本匹配\n- **相关性评分**: 基于匹配类型和频率计算得分\n- **实时索引**: 每次搜索时动态分析文件内容\n\n### 支持的文件类型\n- 所有 `.md` 文件\n- 自动识别扩展生成的对话文件\n- 支持自定义输出目录\n\n### 性能优化\n- 异步文件处理\n- 内存高效的文本搜索\n- 智能的文件过滤\n\n## 未来计划\n\n这个搜索功能是不断发展的，我们计划添加：\n\n- **高级过滤器** - 按日期、AI 类型、会话ID等过滤\n- **保存的搜索** - 保存常用搜索查询\n- **搜索历史** - 查看最近的搜索记录\n- **批量操作** - 对搜索结果进行批量操作\n\n## 反馈与支持\n\n如果您在使用搜索功能时遇到问题或有建议，请：\n\n1. 查看扩展的 GitHub Issues 页面\n2. 提交问题报告或功能请求\n3. 通过邮件联系开发者：857867503@qq.com\n\n---\n\n**💡 提示**: 搜索功能让您的 AI 对话成为真正可搜索的知识库，帮助您快速找到需要的解决方案和灵感！"
}
```

### ✅ 已完成的功能

1. **🔍 全文本搜索功能**

2. **🖥️ 用户界面**
   - 命令面板集成：`LLMChatHistory: Search Chat History`
   - 搜索输入框和结果选择界面
   - 文件自动打开和跳转到匹配位置

3. **🌍 国际化支持**
   - 添加了中英文搜索界面翻译
   - 支持自动语言检测

4. **📝 搜索特性**
   - **智能匹配**：标题、用户消息、助手回复、工具调用等
   - **相关性排序**：基于匹配类型和频率的评分系统
   - **快速跳转**：直接跳转到匹配的对话位置

5. **📚 完整文档**
   - 创建了 `SEARCH_FEATURE.md` 详细使用指南
   - 更新了 `README.md` 功能描述
   - 更新了版本号到 0.2.8

### 🚀 如何使用新功能

1. **打开搜索**：
   - `Ctrl+Shift+P` → "LLMChatHistory: Search Chat History"

2. **输入关键词**：
   - 支持中英文混合搜索
   - 可以搜索代码、技术术语、对话内容等

3. **查看结果**：
   - 显示匹配的对话列表
   - 选择后自动打开文件并高亮匹配内容

### 🔧 技术实现

- **搜索算法**：全文本搜索 + 相关性评分
- **性能优化**：异步处理，内存高效
